package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerRuntimeConfigurationGogcForcedLowWithoutMeasurement() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_gogc_forced_low_without_measurement"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Build and runtime configuration. Flag runtime/debug GC tuning in application code without benchmark notes."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
